events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a group lockbox being misused on a commercial construction project, under Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) scope, at rough-complete stage. Reference: OSHA 1910.147.

Group lockbox misuse means the LOTO procedure for group lockout/tagout is not being followed correctly. Under OSHA 1910.147(f), group lockout/tagout requires each authorized employee to place a personal lockout device on a group lockbox or comparable mechanism. Misuse could mean locks not properly applied, lockbox not securing keys, unauthorized access, etc.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, dangerous)
Risk: high (LOTO failure can lead to serious injury or death)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 80
Value: 0
Confidence: 0.9
Findings: group lockbox misused - not following OSHA 1910.147(f) group lockout/tagout requirements
Actions: halt work, correct group lockbox procedure, ensure each authorized employee applies personal lock, retrain
References: OSHA 1910.147(f)

Let me write theJSON.
